title: Amendment to Tea Rules

P. Appu Menon, Secretary, Coffee Board .,;B angalore, has been granted an extension of earned leave for SIX days from 11th May, 1957 to 16th May, 19f17 (inclusive). 7 [No. 9(16)Plant (B)/57.] A. K. CHAKRAVARTI, Under Secy. TEA CON'rROL New Delhi, the 16th May 1957 S.R.O, 1686.-In exercise 0:1' the powers con:l'erred by section 49 0:1' the Tea Act, 1953 (29 of 1953), the Central Government hereby makes the following amend ments in the Tea Rules, 1954, the same having been previously published 951 required by sub-section (1) of the said section, namely: In sub-rule (1) of rule 4 of the said Rules-- (6) i,n sub-clause (iii) of clause (a), for the words "Government of Tri purs", the words "Tripuru Administration" shall be substituted; (b) in sub-clause (vi) of clause (a), for the word "Travancore-Cochi,,", the word ''Kerala'' shall be substituted; (c) for clause (b), the following clause shall be substituted namely: "(b) three persons rcpn'senting Parliament (two for the Lok Sabha and one for the Rajya Sabha) "; (d) in clause (g), for the word "three"; the word "two" shan be substi tuted. [No. 8(6)Plant(A)/57], P. V. S. SARMA, Dy. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
